title: dryopteris aquilinoides
intro: Dryopteris aquilinoides, also known as the Wood Fern or Shield Fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Dryopteris aquilinoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
